acc.lede: Fill in this form to request your accreditation for {event}.
acc.commitPublish: I commit to crediting the event and sharing my publication.
acc.consent: I agree that my data may be processed to manage my accreditation (GDPR).
acc.required: Required fields: first name, email and consent.

acc.success.title: Request sent
acc.success.body: Thank you {name}. You will receive a confirmation email. After review, a personal link will be sent to you for your interview and report requests.
